nodes.label: TermsPanel
nodes.description: Terms Bank panel (بنك المصطلحات) shown as a tab in StudentView. Navigation badge shows 16 terms stored.

nodes.label: TermsPanel
nodes.description: Sidebar widget showing legal terms mastery progress. Displays 25% mastered overall with breakdown: 4 mastered (منقن), 6 familiar (مألوف), 6 in-learning (قيد التعلم), and a button linking to the full Terms Bank.

properties.description: Legal terms bank panel (بنك المصطلحات tab). Tracks mastery of legal terminology with three states: متقن (mastered), مأخوذ (taken), قيد التعلم (learning). Screenshot shows 15 total terms, 4 mastered (27%).
